mapper.update: update agent_bind_info set pause_state = 1 where user_id = #{userId}
update agent_bind_info set pause_state = 0 where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from agent_bind_info where user_id = #{userId} and agent_code = #{agentCode} and `domain` = #{domain} and bot_id = #{botId}
mapper.select: select distinct user_id from agent_bind_info where bot_id = #{botId} and user_id < 0 and pause_state = 0
